title: VelocityCore
description: VelocityCore is a minimal, high-performance Fabric modpack designed to deliver maximum FPS, reduced stutters, and smooth gameplay without changing vanilla mechanics. Inspired by popular optimization packs like Haste, VelocityCore focuses on performance.
body:
**⚡ VelocityCore – Ultra-Light Performance Modpack**

**VelocityCore** is a minimal, high-performance **Fabric modpack** designed to deliver **maximum FPS, reduced stutters, and smooth gameplay** without changing vanilla mechanics.

Inspired by popular optimization packs like Haste, VelocityCore focuses on **smart performance** **tuning**, clean configs, and carefully selected mods to ensure stability on **low-end, mid-range, and high-end systems.**

**🚀 Key Features**

- Massive **FPS boost** with minimal mod count
- Faster world loading & reduced RAM usage
- Optimized lighting, rendering, and entity handling
- Clean vanilla experience (no gameplay changes)
- Lightweight configs tuned for stability
- Works great on **older PCs and low-end devices**

**🧩 Included Optimizations**

VelocityCore uses trusted Fabric optimization mods such as:
- Advanced rendering & culling optimizations
- Memory and CPU usage improvements
- Lighting and chunk update optimizations
- Background performance enhancements
  
(All mods are fully compatible and actively maintained.)

**🎮 Recommended For**

- Players who want **pure performance**
- Survival & multiplayer players
- Low-end or laptop users
- Anyone who wants Minecraft to feel **smooth and responsive**

**⚙️ Technical Details**

- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.11
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Focus:** Performance • Optimization • Stability
- **Shaders:** Not included (FPS-first philosophy)

**📌 Notes**

- No shaders or heavy visual mods included by default
- Fully compatible with most Fabric QoL mods
- Safe for singleplayer and multiplayer use

**💙 Why VelocityCore?**
Because Minecraft should feel fast, not heavy.
